items.title: 1. Purpose
items.content: To provide a secure, confidential channel for employees, vendors and customers to report unethical conduct, fraud or violation of policies.

items.title: 2. Coverage
items.content: Covers fraud, corruption, harassment, conflict of interest, misuse of authority and breach of code of conduct.

items.title: 3. Reporting channel
items.content: Email whistleblower@prayaancapital.com or write confidentially to the Chairperson – Audit Committee, Prayaan Capital.

items.title: 4. Protection
items.content: No adverse action will be taken against a bona-fide whistleblower. Identity is kept strictly confidential.

items.title: 5. Investigation
items.content: All reports are investigated by the Audit Committee within 60 days.
